스시 Sushi Kim 2
HomeMenuAboutReservationsContact

The Menu 메뉴

Korean soul food,
hand-cut sushi,
정성껏 — with care.

Dishes marked SIGNATURE are the ones we've been serving since we opened in 2001.

Spicy Vegetarian
⌕
SECTION 01 / 05

한식 Korean Specialties

Slow-cooked, deeply seasoned, and served the way the Kim family has served them for 25 years.

Beef Bul Go Gi

불고기 Signature

Sliced tender prime beef marinated in homemade Korean BBQ sauce, grilled to perfection. A quintessential Korean BBQ dish beloved in Pittsburgh for over 25 years.

$28

Gal Bi Gui

갈비구이 Signature

Tender beef short ribs marinated in a rich Korean BBQ sauce and grilled to a smoky, caramelized finish. One of our most popular Korean BBQ dishes.

$38

Dak Galbi

닭갈비

Stir-fried chicken with gochujang, cabbage, sweet potato, and perilla leaves.

$24

Jeyuk Bokkeum

제육볶음

Spicy stir-fried pork belly with onion and scallion.

$22
No dishes found. Try a different search term.
SECTION 02 / 05

밥 Rice & Bowls

Whole meals in a bowl — rice as the foundation, vegetables and protein on top.

Bibimbap

비빔밥 Signature

A vibrant Korean rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, beef, and a fried egg. Served with house gochujang sauce on the side.

$18

Dolsot Bibimbap

돌솥비빔밥 Signature

The same, in a sizzling stone bowl — the rice crisps at the edges.

$21

Japchae

잡채

Sweet potato glass noodles, julienned vegetables, sesame oil.

$20

Kimchi Fried Rice

김치볶음밥

Aged kimchi, rice, scallion, sunny egg.

$16
No dishes found. Try a different search term.
SECTION 03 / 05

찌개 · 탕 Stews & Soups

Restorative bowls. Order with a side of rice — they're meant to be eaten together.

Galbi Tang

갈비탕 Signature

Traditional Korean beef short rib soup simmered with radish, onions, and glass noodles in a clear, deeply savory broth. A Pittsburgh comfort food staple.

$22

Kimchi Jjigae

김치찌개 Signature

Classic Korean kimchi stew made with aged kimchi, pork, tofu, and vegetables. Bold, spicy, and deeply flavorful — the soul of Korean home cooking.

$18

Sundubu Jjigae

순두부찌개

Soft tofu stew, seafood, chili oil, cracked egg. Served bubbling.

$18

Yukgaejang

육개장

Spicy shredded beef soup with fernbrake, scallion, glass noodles.

$20
No dishes found. Try a different search term.
SECTION 04 / 05

스시 · 사시미 Sushi & Sashimi

Hand-cut daily by our sushi chefs. Today's catch is listed on the board at the bar.

Chef's Sushi Platter

모듬스시 Signature

Ten-piece chef's selection — seasonal, hand-cut. Served with miso soup.

$42

Chef's Sashimi

모듬사시미 Signature

Fifteen pieces of today's catch. Bluefin, hamachi, uni, saba, tai.

$48

Spicy Tuna Roll

매운참치롤

Bluefin, spicy mayo, cucumber, sesame. Eight pieces.

$14

Rainbow Roll

무지개롤

California roll topped with assorted sashimi.

$18

Eel Avocado Roll

장어롤

Grilled unagi, avocado, sweet soy glaze.

$16

Omakase

오마카세 Signature

Twelve-course chef's tasting. Reserve 24 hours ahead.

$95
No dishes found. Try a different search term.
SECTION 05 / 05

반찬 Banchan & Sides

Every table begins with a constellation of small plates — refilled on request.

Kimchi Assortment

김치

Napa, radish, cucumber — fermented in-house.

$8

Japchae (side)

잡채

Half portion of glass noodles.

$10

Seaweed Salad

미역무침

Sesame, rice vinegar, scallion.

$7

Steamed Mandu

만두

Pork and chive dumplings, soy-vinegar dip.

$12

Sushi Kim 2

A 25-year Pittsburgh institution serving soulful Korean cooking and premium Japanese sushi in the heart of downtown.
